mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in real-side consumer spending, proxied by RSAFS, signals near-term earnings momentum and risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when the sales trend is above its own trailing average.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2017-10-01 was 486553.0 as of the 2017-11-15 decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce a positive 20-day return spread versus lower growth states, or if the walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 in more than half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE of more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals abrupt labor-market deterioration, weaker household income expectations, and falling earnings revisions, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2017-10-01 was 4.1 as of the 2017-11-15 decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time and the average triggered return is not below the unconditional average at a 5% significance level.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 1.0% and rising over 6 months marks active monetary tightening that raises equity discount rates faster than earnings expectations adjust, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2017-10-01 was 1.15 as of the 2017-11-15 decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening episodes show average 60-day returns equal to or above unconditional returns, or if the estimated coefficient on FEDFUNDS 6-month change is nonnegative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS also rises, markets price a policy-reaction constraint in which inflation pressure prevents easing, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2017-10-01 was 246.639 and FEDFUNDS was 1.15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-and-FEDFUNDS trigger does not underperform either single-series trigger, or if triggered 20-day returns are positive in more than 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in INDPRO over 3 months signals improving goods-sector output and operating leverage, raising expected cyclical earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2017-09-01 was 104.6367 as of the 2017-11-15 decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO changes are followed by 60-day returns below the unconditional mean, or if the sign of the INDPRO coefficient is negative in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST greater than 10% over 6 months signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction-linked income softness, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2017-09-01 was 1127.0 as of the 2017-11-15 decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are not followed by lower 60-day returns than non-triggered periods, or if triggered returns are positive in more than 65% of historical cases.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS grows over 3 months while UNRATE falls, labor income momentum supports consumption without signaling recession stress, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2017-10-01 was 147010.0 and UNRATE was 4.1
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down state fails to generate higher 20-day returns than the unconditional sample, or if its hit rate is below 55% in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth is positive and FEDFUNDS is not rising over 3 months, real activity improves without a simultaneous discount-rate shock, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarterly change > 0 and FEDFUNDS 3-month change <= 0
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value for 2017-07-01 was 17156.946 and FEDFUNDS for 2017-10-01 was 1.15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not produce positive 5-day S&P 500 returns more often than the unconditional positive rate, or if the interaction term has a nonpositive walk-forward coefficient.
